requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, and Power Quality — IEC 61000 Evidence for Networked Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP、EMC和电能质量——联网充电桩IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP、EMC和電能質量——聯網充電樁IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Bhutan's EV charging market is nascent, so charge-point communication and back-office requirements may be set project by project by the operator, importer, fleet owner, government programme, or BPC-connected site owner. Networked chargers should be prepared for OCPP interoperability, remote monitoring, access control, load management, transaction records, and cybersecurity controls where required. EMC and power-quality evidence should follow IEC 61000 family expectations, including conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, harmonic current, voltage fluctuation, surge immunity, and grid disturbance behaviour at Bhutan 230/400 V, 50 Hz conditions.
summary.zh: 不丹电动汽车充电市场仍处于早期，因此充电点通信和后台要求可能由运营商、进口商、车队业主、政府项目或BPC接入场址方按项目设定。联网充电桩应为OCPP互操作、远程监控、访问控制、负载管理、交易记录和适用时的网络安全控制做好准备。EMC和电能质量证据应遵循IEC 61000系列预期，包括传导和辐射发射、抗扰度、谐波电流、电压波动、浪涌抗扰度，以及在不丹230/400 V、50 Hz条件下的电网扰动行为。
summary.zht: 不丹電動汽車充電市場仍處於早期，因此充電點通訊和後台要求可能由運營商、進口商、車隊業主、政府項目或BPC接入場址方按項目設定。聯網充電樁應為OCPP互操作、遠程監控、訪問控制、負載管理、交易記錄和適用時的網絡安全控制做好準備。EMC和電能質量證據應遵循IEC 61000系列預期，包括傳導和輻射發射、抗擾度、諧波電流、電壓波動、浪湧抗擾度，以及在不丹230/400 V、50 Hz條件下的電網擾動行為。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 61000 series — EMC, immunity, harmonics, flicker, surge, and power-quality test methods
IEC 61851-21-2 — EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems
IEC 61851-24 and ISO 15118 where CCS2 DC communication is specified
BPC site-connection and project-specific load-management requirements

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 for charger-to-BMS DC communication and may use operator-specific or proprietary back-office protocols. Some China chargers support OCPP, but the implementation must be validated against the destination operator's back office and final IEC connector configuration. China EMC reports may be based on GB standards and China 220/380 V assumptions; they need mapping to IEC 61000 and revalidation where the connector, enclosure, cable length, radio module, power module, filter, or voltage condition changes.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023用于充电机与BMS之间的直流通信，并可能采用运营商特定或私有后台协议。部分中国充电桩支持OCPP，但其实现必须针对目的地运营商后台和最终IEC接口配置进行验证。中国EMC报告可能基于GB标准和中国220/380 V假设；当接口、外壳、电缆长度、无线模块、功率模块、滤波器或电压条件变化时，需要映射至IEC 61000并重新验证。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023用於充電機與BMS之間的直流通訊，並可能採用運營商特定或私有後台協議。部分中國充電樁支持OCPP，但其實現必須針對目的地運營商後台和最終IEC接口配置進行驗證。中國EMC報告可能基於GB標準和中國220/380 V假設；當接口、外殼、電纜長度、無線模組、功率模組、濾波器或電壓條件變化時，需要映射至IEC 61000並重新驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China operator-specific back-office protocols and EMC evidence

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the OCPP version, SIM or network carrier requirements, local data routing, load-management rules, and acceptance tests with the Bhutan project owner or operator. They should also prepare IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 EMC evidence for the final hardware configuration at 230/400 V, 50 Hz. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no validated OCPP back-office implementation should not be assumed ready for networked Bhutan deployments. EMC evidence from a China GB/T configuration may need retesting after conversion to Type 2 / CCS2.
gap.zh: 出口商应向不丹项目业主或运营方确认OCPP版本、SIM或网络运营商要求、本地数据路由、负载管理规则和验收测试。同时，应为最终硬件配置在230/400 V、50 Hz下准备IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 EMC证据。仅具备GB/T 27930直流通信且未验证OCPP后台实现的充电桩，不应假定可用于不丹联网部署。从中国GB/T配置转换为Type 2 / CCS2后，EMC证据可能需要重新测试。
gap.zht: 出口商應向不丹項目業主或運營方確認OCPP版本、SIM或網絡運營商要求、本地數據路由、負載管理規則和驗收測試。同時，應為最終硬體配置在230/400 V、50 Hz下準備IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 EMC證據。僅具備GB/T 27930直流通訊且未驗證OCPP後台實現的充電樁，不應假定可用於不丹聯網部署。從中國GB/T配置轉換為Type 2 / CCS2後，EMC證據可能需要重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — OCPP is mandatory where required by the operator, public charging programme, tender, or site owner; IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 EMC and power-quality evidence is expected where BSB-adopted standards, BPC connection conditions, or project specifications require it
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication but does not substitute for OCPP back-office integration or IEC 61000 EMC evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Bhutan, treat OCPP and EMC as project acceptance items, not optional marketing features. Confirm the operator's OCPP profile and prepare IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 evidence for the final 230/400 V Type 2 / CCS2 hardware configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对不丹而言，应将OCPP和EMC视为项目验收事项，而非可选营销功能。应确认运营方OCPP配置，并为最终230/400 V Type 2 / CCS2硬件配置准备IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對不丹而言，應將OCPP和EMC視為項目驗收事項，而非可選營銷功能。應確認運營方OCPP配置，並為最終230/400 V Type 2 / CCS2硬體配置準備IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2證據。
